title: Conagra Brands Canada Introduces Bertolli® Frozen Skillet Meals to Help Canadians Bring the Italian Restaurant Experience Home
text: TORONTO, Nov. 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Canadians trust Bertolli® for its rich 150-year heritage that is synonymous with elevated Italian flavours. Now, Conagra Brands Canada, Inc. (NYSE:  CAG ) proudly presents the opportunity to taste that heritage in Bertolli® frozen skillet meals that bring the Italian restaurant experience home.

title: Conagra: A Dividend Play With Reasonable Valuations
text: Conagra Brands, a Chicago-based food company, offers a dividend play with over a 5% dividend payout and reasonable valuations. Despite a lackluster outlook, Conagra is generating a high single digit cash flow yield that easily supports the dividend and is a defensive play in an uncertain market. A full investment analysis is provided in the paragraphs below.

title: Why Conagra Is A Top-Tier Value Play For 2024 And Beyond
text: Conagra Brands is a consumer defensive stock that is facing challenges in a difficult macro environment. The company is experiencing reduced consumer spending and shifting preferences, but its strategic initiatives aim to drive long-term growth. Despite near-term volume declines, CAG has resilient financials, affirmed guidance, and a commitment to lowering leverage, making it a compelling value play with a 5.0% dividend yield.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy: November 2023
text: Some blue-chip stocks had it worse this year than others, particularly as bad news struck at the worst possible time. Markets hate unknowns and uncertainties, and a negative news cycle can crush a stock as investors and analysts weigh the potential long-term financial effects.

title: Reddi-wip® and Ugly Christmas Sweater® Launch Matching Holiday Sweaters for People & Their Pets
text: Limited-edition, Cozy Sweater Collection Whips Up Some Extra Fun This Holiday Season CHICAGO , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Reddi-wip, the iconic real cream whipped topping that's a dessert staple during the holidays and year-round, has partnered with Ugly Christmas Sweater on a new, limited-edition human and pet holiday sweater collection. The festive, coordinating sweaters mimic the bright Reddi-wip can with playful designs like a whipped cream dollop hoodie.

title: Dollar General, Constellation Brands, and Conagra Customers Aren't Acting Like They Usually Do
text: Dollar General is seeing customers shift their buying habits as they focus more on necessities. Constellation Brands' customers shop more frequently, but they are buying less each time they do.

title: Conagra Has 1 Big Goal in 2024: Here's What Investors Need to Know
text: Conagra is seeing customers trying to cut back on food costs so they can spend money elsewhere. Management expects spending patterns to revert to more normal trends in the second half of the year.

title: Canadians can now bring home an elevated Asian restaurant experience with P.F. Chang's Home Menu™ sauces and frozen meals
text: MISSISSAUGA, Ontario, Nov. 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Canadians who want an elevated dining experience at home can now enjoy the bold, restaurant-inspired flavours of P.F. Chang's™, the number one Asian casual dining restaurant in the United States.1

title: Get Cozy This Hot Cocoa Season With The Swiss Miss® Candier® Candle
text: The perfect gift for hot cocoa lovers adds an inviting aroma to your home CHICAGO , Nov. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Gather your sweaters and fuzzy socks and set the mood with the new Swiss Miss Hot Cocoa candle. Swiss Miss, a brand of Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG), has teamed up with premium home fragrance company Candier by Ryan Porter to create a limited-edition candle that brings the sweet scent of everyone's favorite cold weather drink into your home this holiday season.

title: Gardein Challenges Canadians to Share Real Reactions to New SUPRÊME™ Lineup
text: TORONTO, Nov. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gardein®, a brand of Conagra Brands, Inc., is expanding its line-up of SUPRÊME™ plant-based products for meat alternative options that look, cook and satisfy like the real deal. Inspired by Canadians' favourite cravings like crispy chicken sandwiches, saucy boneless wings and juicy sausages, Gardein® SUPRÊME™ is making it easier for Canadians to reduce their meat consumption while still satisfying their appetites.

title: Conagra Brands Named to Military Times' 2023 Best for Vets: Employers List
text: CHICAGO, Nov. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) today announced that it has been recognized on the 2023 Best for Vets: Employers list by Military Times. This recognition comes as the company continues to demonstrate its dedication to supporting veterans and active-duty service members, as well as their families, through strategic partnerships and internal initiatives.

title: Conagra: Why Consumer Purchasing Habits Look Poised to Swing in Favor of the Food Giant
text: Conagra is a large consumer staples company that sells products like popcorn and meat sticks. The shift in consumer habits may be starting to turn back in favor of the food producer.
